gates.requirement: Exact baseline and branch synchronization preconditions are recorded and executable.
Frozen V0-IPEC v0.1 outcome vocabulary and precedence are preserved exactly.
No replacement or invented IPEC typed-outcome code is introduced.
T157-T162 use a separate collision-free extension namespace.
All nine exact WP2 case profiles are bound.
Exact theorem and role lineage is enforced for every case.
Every nonprocedural result carries non-empty theorem and evidence lineage.
Source-result evidence SHA-256 is verified canonically.
Diagnostic order and content are transported without reinterpretation.
WP2 PASS cannot become CERTIFIED before WP4 proof-evidence activation.
Extension-theorem rejection cannot become theorem-backed rejection before WP4 activation.
Inherited theorem-backed DLE rejection maps to REJECTED_DLE_FAILURE.
Inherited theorem-backed branch rejection maps to REJECTED_BRANCH_PROMOTION.
Inherited robust obstruction rejection follows IPEC precedence.
Unsupported/deferred input maps to INCONCLUSIVE_UNSUPPORTED_FRAGMENT.
All 15 fixtures reproduce deterministically.
All schemas validate under JSON Schema Draft 2020-12.
The WP3 SHA-256 ledger reproduces exactly.
Only the two exact-hash-guarded WP2 successor compatibility paths may be modified; no baseline path may be deleted.
All WP0/WP1/WP2 canonical records and canonical ledgers remain byte-preserved; the WP2 successor verifier and successor ledger are updated coherently.
Full Python regression is included in local and hosted validation.
Proof-hole scan is included in local and hosted validation.
git diff --check and explicit new-file whitespace scan are included.
No commit, push, tag, GitHub Release, Zenodo, or DOI action is authorized.
